internal_documents.content: Work start WORK-TAL-2026-039 begins for Talon Installers at Site 7G on 2026-06-22 requiring umbrella liability.
COI insufficiency alert remains visible for umbrella liability.
Insurance endorsement END-TAL-039 covers Talon Installers, Site 7G, umbrella liability, effective 2026-06-20 before work begins.

policy_documents.content: Contractor site start is complete only when insurance endorsement matches contractor, site, required coverage, and work start date before work begins.
